{{Infobox group
| name = Blackwatch
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Blackwatch Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Blackwatch is an [[Imperial]] [[Guild]] established by [[the Emperor]] to study and utilize the powers of the [[Elders]] for the benefit of humanity. Operating under the creed that understanding leads to control over the unknown, the organization functions as a disciplined, regimented military force. Their primary role is to serve as guardians against unspeakable threats, standing between the general population and dangerous entities. They are known for their expertise in [[Elder]] biology and their ability to counter Great [[Elder powers]]. Members of the Blackwatch, known as [[Watchmen]], are easily identified by their long black uniforms featuring silver buttons. Their official crest, the [[Elder]]’s Eyes, depicts six inhuman eyes atop a nest of tentacles. [[The Guild]] utilizes specialized weaponry, most notably black iron spikes or nails invested with unique [[Intent]]; these ancient tools are capable of pinning down and sealing [[Elderspawn]] alive. Despite their protective mission, the Blackwatch is often viewed with fear and suspicion by the public. Many people distrust them, viewing them as either monsters serving the [[Empire]] or even an [[Elder]] cult themselves. This lack of public favor often leads to social resistance and tension between the Blackwatch and other groups. [[The Guild]] is led by a Head, currently [[Bliss]], who oversees its various units and operations.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Blackwatch is a [[Guild]] founded by [[the Emperor]] to turn the power of the [[Elders]] toward the good of humanity and defend against them. Comprised of soldiers in black uniforms who maintain driftwood shelters, the organization has spent five years handling [[Elders]] by capturing, examining, and fishing for them in the [[Aion Sea]]. While they provide help and work with [[Witnesses]], the group faces rumors of blood-drinking and [[Elder]] worship, resulting in low public opinion. Their authority is limited to emergencies or [[Guild]]-sanctioned assignments, such as ordering citizens regarding [[Elder]] magic, though they also intend to bind the [[Heart]] to a chosen individual. Members like [[Calder]] have served in the group for some time, utilizing tools like [[The Testament]] and commissioning confidential reports to manage their duties.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is an organization [[Alsa]] was associated with.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that [[Witnesses]] have worked with.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] defend against the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Rumors suggest the [[Blackwatch]] worship [[Elders]] and drink human blood.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] are associated with something called a Whispering Gaunt.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that members might wish were around to answer questions.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Emperor]] formed the [[Blackwatch]] to turn the power of the [[Elders]] against them.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Watchmen]] of the [[Blackwatch]] wear black uniforms.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] is an organization that provides help.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] consists of soldiers in black who stand between people and the hunger of the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] is a group consisting of members in black coats.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] was founded to turn the powers of the [[Elders]] to the good of humanity.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] intends to bind the [[Heart]] to one of their choosing.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] is a group that [[Calder]] could potentially claim an issue for.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that appears to have gouged a hole in the [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] maintains shelters made of driftwood.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] are fighting their own creatures.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A contingent of [[Blackwatch]] descended the crater walls.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] use iron nails as a form of salute.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] is a group with members.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] authority is limited to [[Guild]]-sanctioned assignments or certain emergencies.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] are not held in high public opinion.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] members can order citizens to do things related to an [[Elder]] or [[Elder]] magic, or if [[Elderspawn]] are spotted.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is involved in the meeting.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] is associated with a crest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is a [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]] is a group that [[Calder]] has been a member of for some time.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that has authority and uniforms.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Members of the [[Blackwatch]] keep [[Shuffles]] as pets.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] has handled the [[Elders]] for the past five years.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] fish for [[Elders]] in the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] capture and examine [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] is an organization that commissions reports and uses [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Artur Belfry]]'s report was confidential to the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Blackwatch is an organization identified by their silver-buttoned black coats and the [[Elder]] Eyes crest. While Clayborn planned to rendezvous with the group on [[Nakothi's island]], [[Yala]] sought to sabotage them during their hunt for the [[Heart of Nakothi]]. Stationed on the western side of the [[island]], the group entered into conflict with the [[Luminian Order]] and issued calls for the death of the [[Consultants]]. Their operations included the theft of sensitive documents concerning [[Nakothi]] and her spawn, though they were eventually betrayed by the [[Watchman]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Blackwatch]] is an organization that [[Tombstone]] was questioned about wearing.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that [[Yala]] intends to sabotage.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Clayborn intends to rendezvous with the [[Blackwatch]] on [[Nakothi's island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch]] is hunting for the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch]] are stationed on the western side of [[Nakothi's island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Blackwatch]] members wear silver-buttoned black coats.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch]] would be calling for the death of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch]] and the [[Luminian Order]] are in conflict.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A member of the [[Blackwatch]] stole sensitive documents regarding [[Nakothi]] and her spawn.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Watchman]] betrayed the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch]] crest is the [[Elder]] Eyes.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Blackwatch is an organization within the Imperialist alliance that serves humanity by studying [[Elders]] and providing protection to the people. Guided by creeds such as 'Through understanding, we control the unknown,' the group performs tests on [[Elder]] creatures and has even commissioned research into the properties of the [[Sandborn Hydra]]. While [[Calder Marten]] once spent two years as a member of the group, he was eventually expelled and subsequently became a target of their hunt, though they ultimately declined to formally register charges against him. Led by [[Bliss]], whose predecessors have occupied the position of Head for four hundred years, the organization receives reports and can be summoned through official [[Guild]] action. The Blackwatch is mobilized by [[the Emperor]] to manage [[Elder]] activity, though they have arrived in regions where [[Elderspawn]] infections had already spread, and they maintain discipline by feeding those who breach conduct to the [[Elderspawn]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is hunted by the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Bliss]] is the Head of the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Blackwatch]] is a group that includes predecessors of [[Bliss]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] declined to formally register charges against [[Calder Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that performs tests on [[Elder]] creatures.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Blackwatch]] is an organization [[Jerri's father]] belonged to.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Head of the [[Blackwatch]] spoke four hundred years ago.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] is part of the Imperialist alliance.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] arrived after an [[Elderspawn]] infection had already spread through a region.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] punishes breaches of conduct by feeding people to [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The mission of the [[Blackwatch]] is studying the [[Elders]] in the service of humanity.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Blackwatch]] is an organization that receives reports.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Blackwatch]] has creeds including 'Through understanding, we control the unknown'.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that provides protection to the people.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that can be called to one's side through official [[Guild]] action.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] spent two years in the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] commissioned research into the [[Sandborn Hydra]]'s properties for work on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch]] is one of the groups mobilized by [[the Emperor]] to deal with [[Elder]] activity.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was expelled from the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] spent time with the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Historically, the ancient Blackwatch was known for capturing [[Elders]] and executing those who were [[Elder]]-touched. This organization, which possesses knowledge regarding extended lifespans and travel abilities, is often mentioned alongside the [[Nakothi]]. While the group's leadership is typically held by a woman, their [[Guild Head]] can be an unpredictable figure. Currently, the Blackwatch has lost contact and is engaged in cleansing the [[Capital]] of [[Elderspawn]]. They are among the groups expected to attack [[Gray Island]], and their forces—which include a girl wielding a spear—have been seen in action by [[Darius]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The ancient [[Blackwatch]] would capture [[Elders]] and kill the [[Elder]]-touched.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that captures and studies [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] has lost contact.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that knows about the ability to travel and live longer.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] is mentioned in the same context as [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]]'s head is usually a woman.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group whose [[Guild Head]] can be unpredictable.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] are cleansing the [[Capital]] of [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] is one of the groups expected to attack [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group [[Darius]] has seen action against.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Blackwatch]] is a group that includes a girl with a spear.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Blackwatch is a disciplined, regimented army that operates like a militia and is characterized by its members wearing long, black coats with silver buttons. Guided by the principle that [[Elders]] must be studied to be effectively opposed, the group has successfully disproved most superstitions regarding [[Elder]] names and even recovered a fragment of pottery from the [[Thousand Eyes]]. While they have utilized an inn as their headquarters and maintained security over buildings, some of their watchmen occasionally develop a [[Reader's sense]]. The organization is associated with seven spikes and includes members such as [[Bliss]], while [[Calder]] previously worked for the group in his youth after receiving a personal voucher from the Head of the Blackwatch. Additionally, [[Calder]]'s mother is able to represent this group.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Blackwatch]] recovered a fragment of pottery from the [[Thousand Eyes]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A guiding principle of the [[Blackwatch]] is that [[Elders]] must be studied if they are to be opposed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Blackwatch]] studies [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Blackwatch]] is a group that [[Calder]]'s mother can represent.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Blackwatch]] is a disciplined, regimented army wearing long, black, silver-buttoned coats.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Head of the [[Blackwatch]] has vouched for [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A flock of [[Blackwatch]] is holding a building secure.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Blackwatch]] used an inn as their headquarters.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Blackwatch]] has disproved most superstitions about [[Elder]] names.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Watchmen]] in the [[Blackwatch]] sometimes develop a [[Reader's sense]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Blackwatch]] is described as acting like a militia.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] worked for the [[Blackwatch]] in his youth.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Blackwatch]] is associated with seven spikes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Blackwatch]] is a group that [[Bliss]] belongs to.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Blackwatch is an army of fighters that operates alongside the Luminians. During a confrontation, members of this group were seen pulling nails from their coats while [[Yala]] stood surrounded by the dead or dying soldiers. As part of a panel established by [[Calder]] to counter various reports, the group also manages specific duties regarding ancient sites. This includes performing monthly inspections of [[Urg’naut's tomb]], despite the army having previously encountered difficulties with tombs.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Blackwatch]] pulled nails from their coats.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yala]] was surrounded by dead or dying [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Blackwatch]] is an army.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Blackwatch]] is part of a panel formed by [[Calder]] to counter reports.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Blackwatch]] has had trouble with tombs.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Blackwatch]] performs monthly inspections of [[Urg’naut's tomb]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Blackwatch]] is a group of fighters fighting alongside Luminians.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I’m surprised your father didn’t tell you. What did you think I did for the Blackwatch?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“They defend us from the Elders,” Jyrine said.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“They worship Elders and drink human blood,” Calder whispered.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I’ve never heard, except that it involves something called a Whispering Gaunt.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"And this is exactly what the Blackwatch was founded to do. Turn the powers of the Elders to the good of humanity."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
